title: Gritty Turkish Deodeok Root Kofte
description: Earthy, flaky Turkish koftes made from deodeok root and millet, seasoned with fermented jang and aromatic spices.
instructions: Peel and grate the deodeok root.
Combine grated root, fermented jang, olive oil, water, and millet in a bowl; let soak 15 minutes.
Heat a pan and sauté onion and garlic until translucent.
Add the sautéed aromatics to the root mixture and stir in cumin, turmeric, salt, and pepper.
Stir in chickpea flour to bind the mixture; let it cool to room temperature.
Shape the mixture into small patties or balls.
Heat oil in a skillet over medium heat and brown the koftes on all sides, about 4 minutes per side.
Transfer koftes to a plate; serve hot with yogurt dip or fresh salad.
Enjoy the earthy, flaky Turkish deodeok root koftes.
